subject: fix: regression fix, 29 new tests, stale docs updated
body:
Functional regression fixed:
- PlatformPreview.jsx: Search filter indicator now uses filteredGroups
  instead of categoryPlatformGroups, preventing stale selected-format
  indicator when search hides the selected platform's category.

TDZ bug fixed:
- stylePresets.js: Moved textStyles constants (cleanTextStyles, etc.)
  BEFORE lookPresets array that references them. Vite's bundler masked
  this because of module-level hoisting, but Node/Jest ESM enforces
  const TDZ strictly, causing test failures.

29 new tests (56 total, was 27):
- config/__tests__/stylePresets.test.js (10 tests): getLookPreset,
  getLookSettingsForLayout (null/valid/textStyles/fallback/overlay),
  lookPresets data integrity (textStyles on all presets, all 6 elements)
- utils/__tests__/canvasRenderers.test.js (15 tests): buildFilterStyle
  (null/default/single/compound/contrast-brightness), getAlignItems,
  getJustifyContent, getFrameDimensions (normal/zero/full)
- utils/__tests__/exportHelpers.test.js (4 tests): getTimestamp format,
  FORMAT_OPTIONS, FILE_EXTENSIONS, MIME_TYPES constants

Documentation updated (4 files):
- README.md: 42 formats / 18 groups, new platforms, search, long-press,
  lazy fonts, look text styles
- USER_GUIDE.md: New platforms, search filter, mobile long-press tips
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: Updated counts, E6 search test, MOB1 long-press
  test, npm test in regression checklist
- TutorialModal.jsx: Platform search mention, mobile long-press tip

Tags: regression, tests, docs, platforms, search, tutorial
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
